title: patagonium retusum
side_effects: Patagonium retusum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, in some individuals due to its high levels of toxic compounds. Additionally, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts has been linked to liver damage and kidney problems in rare cases. In some instances, improper use of Patagonium retusum may also lead to allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, its toxic properties can also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in individuals who are sensitive to its compounds.
